traces.question: What is the return policy for electronics purchased online?

messages.content: What is the return policy for electronics purchased online?
Let me look that up for you.
Found 3 relevant chunks. Top result: Electronics may be returned within 30 days of delivery if unopened. Opened electronics are subject to a 15 percent restocking fee.
You can return electronics within 30 days of delivery. Unopened items get a full refund. Opened items have a 15 percent restocking fee.

traces.generation: You can return electronics within 30 days of delivery. Unopened items get a full refund. Opened items have a 15 percent restocking fee.

traces.question: Is the Eiffel Tower taller than the Statue of Liberty?

messages.content: Is the Eiffel Tower taller than the Statue of Liberty?
